task: Move the yellow scrubber to the front left of stove top
raw:
Scene: yellow_scrubber, green_cloth, metal_bowl, cheese_slice, stove_top
Step 1: reach(yellow_scrubber)
  affordance_region: the yellow scrubber on the green cloth
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, yellow_scrubber, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, yellow_scrubber) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(yellow_scrubber)
  affordance_region: the yellow scrubber on the green cloth
  contact: holding(yellow_scrubber) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_scrubber)
Step 3: transport(yellow_scrubber -> front_left_stove_top)
  affordance_region: the empty area on the front left of the stove top
  spatial: above(yellow_scrubber, front_left_stove_top, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(yellow_scrubber)
  done_when: above(yellow_scrubber, front_left_stove_top, 0.05)
Step 4: place(yellow_scrubber -> front_left_stove_top)
  affordance_region: the empty area on the front left of the stove top
  contact: surface_contact(yellow_scrubber, front_left_stove_top) [completion]; released(yellow_scrubber) [completion]
  pose: stable(yellow_scrubber) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(yellow_scrubber, front_left_stove_top) AND released(yellow_scrubber) AND stable(yellow_scrubber)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the yellow scrubber on the green cloth
